rules: Birth Snapshot shows Panchang, Avakhada, and Ghatak/favorable cards.
Charts shows D1, Moon, D9, D10, and Chalit first.
What This Means shows compact predictive cards per focus chart.
Classical Tables are hidden in disclosure details until the user opens proof.
Swamsa and Karakamsha stay available in a disclosure so soul charts are not removed.
Download Full Report is visible as the deep reading CTA.
Birth Snapshot is one compact card group.
Charts lists focus charts before all other vargas.
What This Means uses short predictive cards.
Classical Tables are behind a tap-to-open disclosure.
Swamsa and Karakamsha stay available behind a tap-to-open disclosure.
Ask Predicta and Download Full Report actions are near the progressive panel.
